g.title: query.from_relation:parent_relation->query.from_relation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent_relation) REFERENCES query.from_relation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.from_relation:on_clause->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (on_clause) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.record_column:from_relation->query.from_relation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (from_relation) REFERENCES query.from_relation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.stored_query:from_clause->query.from_relation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (from_clause) REFERENCES query.from_relation(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
